data.title: Infini Founder Ensures Smooth Withdrawals With Personal Funds
data.description: According to PANews, Infini founder Christian announced in a community message that withdrawals are currently proceeding smoothly. He stated that he is using personal funds to facilitate these transactions.

data.title: Infini Co-Founder Addresses Security Concerns
data.description: According to Odaily, Infini co-founder Christianeth addressed concerns on the X platform regarding a recent security issue. He assured that his personal private key was not compromised and urged people not to worry excessively. The incident was attributed to an oversight during a previous transfer of authority, which he acknowledged as his responsibility. Christianeth expressed gratitude for the support and voices of concern from friends, stating that liquidity remains unaffected and full compensation is possible. Efforts are underway to trace the funds involved.

data.title: Du Jun Comments On Infini's Challenges And Offers Support
data.description: According to Odaily, Du Jun recently shared his thoughts on the X platform regarding Infini's current situation. He expressed confidence in the team's operational strategies, marketing efforts, and financial strength. Du Jun suggested that losing a small amount of money now could serve as a valuable lesson to enhance security capabilities, which is preferable to incurring larger losses in the future. He also mentioned his willingness to provide financial support ranging from 5 to 10 million if needed, as he is currently seeking investment opportunities.

data.title: The Sandbox team may have transferred 8 million SAND to Binance, equivalent to about 2.7 million US dollars.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to The Data Nerd, the wallet address "0xx73f" belonging to the Sandbox team transferred 8 million SAND (about 2.7 million US dollars) to Binance 10 minutes ago. The wallet at this address also transferred the same amount of tokens to Binance last month, and then the price of SAND fell by 33%. Currently, the address still holds 8 million SAND.

data.title: CMC Altcoin Season Index Drops to 27
data.description: According to CoinMarketCap (CMC) data, the CMC Altcoin Season Index currently stands at 27, reflecting a decline of 12 points compared to the last week.The index measures market performance by analyzing the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization, to determine whether the market is in an altcoin season or remains Bitcoin-dominated.Over the past 90 days, 27 of these altcoins have outperformed Bitcoin in price growth, signalling a weakening altcoin trend.

data.title: BeosinTrace: Bybit hackers were still transferring assets for nearly half an hour
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BeosinTrace tracked the Bybit hacker's new address 0x83c7678492d623fb98834f0fbcb2e7b7f5af8950 to start transferring at 14:52:59 on February 24, 2025, and the old address 0x83c7678492d623fb98834f0fbcb2e7b7f5af8950 transferred all assets at 14:57:59 on February 24, 2025. BeosinKYT has tagged these addresses, and the destination addresses are mainly Thorchain and exch. Thorchain and exch are still the preferred channels for hackers to wash funds.

data.title: A whale reduced its holdings of 867,000 RAYs and would lose $1.27 million by selling them
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ai Yi, an analyst on the chain, RAY has fallen by nearly 30% due to the news of pump.fun's self-built AMA.
The whale "DMBZ2...XvQvD" reduced his position of 867,000 RAY (US$2.83 million) accumulated in the past four months. If he sells, he will lose US$1.27 million. In the past three days, he has recharged US$6.45 million of RAY to the exchange, with a cost of US$4.73, and a cumulative loss of US$1.517 million.

data.title: Matrixport: Bybit theft incident hides buying or boosts ETH rebound
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Matrixport released today's chart saying that the market's focus is on how Bybit suffered nearly 500,000 ETH theft on Friday, but what is really worth paying attention to is its impact on the market. Bybit needs to buy back ETH to replenish wallet funds, and hackers need to be cautious in subsequent operations.
From past experience, stolen funds are usually not sold immediately, that is, short-term selling pressure may be limited. At the same time, the market has added potential buying demand for 500,000 ETH, while it is reported that only about 100,000 ETH has been repurchased. The imbalance between supply and demand may drive ETH prices up. Given that prices have shown signs of stabilization, we are optimistic about the current trend.

data.title: Survey: Nearly 15% of Brazilians would consider using cryptocurrency as a replacement for bank accounts
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: A survey by YouGov, an international online research data company, shows that nearly 15% of Brazilians would consider replacing their bank account functions with cryptocurrencies. 14.7% of respondents are willing to accept this possibility, of which 5.7% agree to make this decision and 9% tend to agree to this arrangement.
According to David Eastman, YouGov's managing director for Latin America, this should be a catalyst for banks to change the way they do business with their customers. Assuming that these customers do leave, this will affect the income of these financial institutions, cutting a lot of their income in the process. (news.bitcoin)

data.title: Binance will launch spot trading pairs such as TRX/FDUSD
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance will launch BNB/ARS, ETH/MXN, KAITO/BRL, SOL/ARS, SOL/MXN, TRUMP/BRL, TRX/FDUSD and TST/TRY spot trading pairs at 16:00 (Eastern Time) on February 25, 2025. ARS, BRL, MXN and TRY are legal currency codes, not digital currency codes.
